summary: Separate vitest config and npm script for transcript evals with manifest-based fixture discovery
context: Phase 17 success criteria requires npm run eval:transcript as a separate command. Need a way to discover and describe fixture files.
rationale: Separate config keeps synthetic and transcript runs independent per success criteria. Manifest file allows annotating fixtures with metadata (description, expected quality) for richer reporting vs bare glob discovery.

alternatives.option: Shared vitest.config.eval.ts for both synthetic and transcript
alternatives.reason_rejected: Success criteria explicitly requires separate npm run eval:transcript command
No way to attach metadata (expected quality, description) to bare files
